scripts.build: npm run vendor:copy && npx sass --no-source-map mc-admin/assets/src/scss/admin.scss:mc-admin/assets/css/admin.css mc-admin/assets/src/scss/auth.scss:mc-admin/assets/css/auth.css mc-content/themes/default/src/scss/style.scss:mc-content/themes/default/style.css --style=expanded && npx sass --no-source-map mc-admin/assets/src/scss/admin.scss:mc-admin/assets/css/admin.min.css mc-admin/assets/src/scss/auth.scss:mc-admin/assets/css/auth.min.css mc-content/themes/default/src/scss/style.scss:mc-content/themes/default/style.min.css --style=compressed
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --names docker,scss --prefix-colors cyan,magenta "docker compose up" "npm run watch"
